title: poa bulbosa subsp. delicatula
intro: Poa bulbosa subsp. delicatula, also known as the 'delicate bluegrass', is a subspecies of the Poa bulbosa species, a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to its high content of saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Poa bulbosa subsp. delicatula include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and protect against oxidative stress. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, with dried roots and rhizomes being used to make medicinal preparations.
